Off Calendar Oct-02-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - ATTY. KRISTIN KERR OF THE LAW OFFICE OF GEORGE WOLFF, TEL. NO. 788-1881 APPEARING FOR THE PLAINTIFF;
ATTY. DANIEL A. SCOTT OF THE VAN DE POEL, LEVY & ALLEN LLP, TEL. NO. 291-8844 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANTS.

RULING - A R G U E D; The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANTS CROWN BUILDERS INCORPORATED, CARLOS FLORES, LAURA FLORES and AMERICAN CONTRACTORS INDEMNITY COMPANY'S Motion To Enforce Settlement is granted. In accordance with the settlement, Plaintiff's counsel shall immediately file a voluntary dismissal with prejudice with each party to bear their own attorney's fees and costs.
